question: Assuming today is Thursday of the current week, what is the approximate average number of visits for the entire week?

options.A: Unable to calculate, because the data for the full week is not yet available
options.B: About 30 visits per day on average
options.C: About 17 visits per day, computed from all seven days shown
options.D: About 29 visits per day, averaging only Monday through Thursday

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
